sentences.target: C'est la version mise en ligne aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /sɛ la vɛʁsjɔ̃ miz ɑ̃ liɲ oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: C'est la version mise en ligne aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /sɛ la vɛʁsjɔ̃ miz ɑ̃ liɲ oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: This is the version posted online today.
translations.es: Esta es la versión publicada hoy en internet.
translations.de: Das ist die heute online veröffentlichte Version.
translations.it: Questa è la versione pubblicata online oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是今天发布到网上的版本。
translations.yue: 呢個係今日喺網上發佈嘅版本。
translations.ru: Это версия, опубликованная сегодня в интернете.
translations.pt: Esta é a versão publicada online hoje.
translations.vi: Đây là phiên bản được đăng lên mạng hôm nay.
translations.ar: هذه هي النسخة المنشورة اليوم على الإنترنت.
translations.nl: Dit is de versie die vandaag online is geplaatst.
translations.hu: Ez a ma online közzétett verzió.
translations.hi: यह आज ऑनलाइन पोस्ट किया गया संस्करण है.
translations.pl: To wersja opublikowana dziś w internecie.
translations.el: Αυτή είναι η έκδοση που δημοσιεύτηκε σήμερα στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Dette er versjonen som ble publisert på nett i dag.
translations.id: Ini adalah versi yang diposting online hari ini.
translations.sv: Det här är versionen som publicerades online i dag.
translations.ro: Aceasta este versiunea publicată online astăzi.
translations.cs: Toto je verze zveřejněná dnes online.
translations.da: Dette er versionen, der blev lagt online i dag.
translations.fi: Tämä on versio, joka julkaistiin tänään verkossa.
translations.ja: これは今日オンラインに公開されたバージョンです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ce elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copula verb, 3rd person singular present, linking the subject pronoun to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun version.
Common noun, feminine; predicate nominal identified by the copula.
Past participle, feminine singular, used as a reduced relative modifier of version (‘version [that was] put…’).
Preposition introducing the complement ligne; part of the fixed expression en ligne.
Noun functioning within the prepositional phrase en ligne (‘online’).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating when the version was put online.

sentences.target: Tu préfères cette version du film.

translations.fr: Tu préfères cette version du film.
translations.en: You prefer this version of the movie.
translations.es: Prefieres esta versión de la película.
translations.de: Du bevorzugst diese Version des Films.
translations.ko: 너는 이 영화의 이 버전을 선호해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢这部电影的这个版本。
translations.yue: 你鍾意呢套戲嘅呢個版本多啲。
translations.pt: Você prefere esta versão do filme.
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את הגרסה הזו של הסרט.
translations.tr: Bu filmin bu sürümünü tercih ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn thích phiên bản này của bộ phim hơn.
translations.ar: أنت تفضل هذه النسخة من الفيلم.
translations.nl: Je geeft de voorkeur aan deze versie van de film.
translations.uk: Ти надаєш перевагу цій версії фільму.
translations.hu: A filmnek ezt a verzióját jobban kedveled.
translations.hi: तुम इस फिल्म के इस संस्करण को अधिक पसंद करते हो.
translations.el: Προτιμάς αυτήν την εκδοχή της ταινίας.
translations.nb: Du foretrekker denne versjonen av filmen.
translations.id: Kamu lebih menyukai versi film yang ini.
translations.sv: Du föredrar den här versionen av filmen.
translations.da: Du foretrækker denne version af filmen.
translations.ja: この映画のこのバージョンのほうが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, 2nd person singular present indicative; takes version as its direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, pointing to a specific version.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of préfères.
Contraction of de + le; preposition introducing the genitive complement film (‘of the film’).
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition du.

sentences.target: J'attends la nouvelle version de l'appli.

translations.fr: J'attends la nouvelle version de l'appli.
translations.en: I'm waiting for the new version of the app.
translations.es: Estoy esperando la nueva versión de la aplicación.
translations.de: Ich warte auf die neue Version der App.
translations.it: Sto aspettando la nuova versione dell'app.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在等待这款应用的新版本。
translations.yue: 我喺等呢個應用程式嘅新版本。
translations.pt: Estou esperando a nova versão do aplicativo.
translations.he: אני מחכה לגרסה החדשה של האפליקציה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chờ phiên bản mới của ứng dụng.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر النسخة الجديدة من التطبيق.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op de nieuwe versie van de app.
translations.hi: मैं ऐप के नए संस्करण का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Περιμένω τη νέα έκδοση της εφαρμογής.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på den nye versjonen av appen.
translations.id: Saya menunggu versi baru dari aplikasi.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på den nya versionen av appen.
translations.da: Jeg venter på den nye version af appen.
translations.ja: アプリの新しいバージョンを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun je elided before a vowel; subject of attends.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing nouvelle version.
Adjective, feminine singular, attributive modifier of version.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of attends.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase l'appli, marking possession/origin.
Definite article elided before a vowel/h muet; agrees with appli (feminine singular).
Common noun (colloquial shortening of application), feminine; object of the preposition de.

sentences.target: On lit ta version des faits.

translations.fr: On lit ta version des faits.
translations.en: We’re reading your version of events.
translations.es: Estamos leyendo tu versión de los hechos.
translations.de: Wir lesen deine Version der Ereignisse.
translations.it: Stiamo leggendo la tua versione dei fatti.
translations.ko: 우리는 네가 겪은 일에 대한 너의 설명을 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在阅读你对事件的说法。
translations.yue: 我哋喺睇你對事件嘅講法。
translations.pt: Estamos lendo sua versão dos acontecimentos.
translations.he: אנחנו קוראים את הגרסה שלך לאירועים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đọc cách bạn kể lại sự việc.
translations.nl: We lezen jouw versie van de gebeurtenissen.
translations.hu: Olvassuk a te verziódat az eseményekről.
translations.hi: हम तुम्हारे घटनाक्रम का विवरण पढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διαβάζουμε τη δική σου εκδοχή των γεγονότων.
translations.nb: Vi leser din versjon av hendelsene.
translations.id: Kami sedang membaca versi kejadian menurutmu.
translations.sv: Vi läser din version av händelserna.
translations.da: Vi læser din version af begivenhederne.
translations.ja: あなたの言い分を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (colloquially ‘we’); governs a 3rd person singular verb.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes version as direct object.
2nd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying version.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of lit.
Contraction of de + les; preposition introducing the plural complement faits (‘of the facts’).
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition des.
